steps.title: Identify the key difference to emphasize
steps.content: From the notes, Clermontia kakeana is native while Ardisia elliptica is non-native. This native-status difference is what the answer must highlight.

steps.title: Find the choice that directly emphasizes this difference
steps.content:
Choice D directly emphasizes the difference by presenting both plants together (“can both be found…”) then contrasting their native status (“only the former plant is native”).

The other three fail because
  • A treats both equally in seed dispersal
  • B focuses on the study's methodology
  • C mentions one plant without comparison
.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
